scores.notes: Uses legacy install+config_changed pattern with a _reconcile method rather than the modern CollectStatusEvent approach (both valid per gold standard, but loses idiomatic point). charm-python-packages at top level of charmcraft.yaml is suspect — in modern charmcraft this belongs under parts.charm, not at root level, making it a minor inaccuracy. K8s requirements (containers + resources) are correctly declared. Config option correctly defined with empty default.
